messages.content:
You are an AI assistant playing ScienceWorld, a text-based science environment.
Your goal is to complete the task by issuing grounded text actions.

IMPORTANT: You MUST respond in the following format:
1. Think briefly in <thinking></thinking>
2. Output exactly one environment action in <action></action>

Examples of actions:
- look around
- inventory
- examine beaker
- open door to art studio
- pour cup containing blue paint in glass cup

Example response:
<thinking>I should inspect the room before manipulating objects.</thinking>
<action>look around</action>

<thinking>I should check the inventory to see if there are any useful items or clues.</thinking>
<action>look in inventory</action>

<thinking>I should examine the orange to see if it contains any useful information or clues.</thinking>
<action>look at orange</action>

<thinking>The orange might have some useful information. I should examine it more closely.</thinking>
<action>examine orange</action>

<thinking>The orange didn't provide any useful information. I should try examining it again to see if there's more to discover.</thinking>
<action>examine orange</action>
